pattern: A pairwise-zero AND condition is equivalent to the bits of the window being disjoint, so a sliding window tracking a running OR mask finds the longest stretch in linear time.
hints: Every pair in the window having AND zero means no two numbers share a set bit.
Track the OR of the current window; a new number fits only if it shares no bits with that running OR.
Slide a window: while the incoming value collides (AND with the mask is non-zero), remove the leftmost value by XOR-ing it out, then add the new value and record the window length.

edge_inputs.description: best window of length three in the middle
everything overlaps so answer is one
powers of two are all mutually disjoint
all identical values give length one

stress.description: random values with occasional disjoint runs
stress.note: wide bit range gives a mix of long and short nice windows
